warnings: Source branch stock is deducted immediately when the transfer is created — before the destination receives it. Ensure the source branch has enough stock before creating the transfer.
Destination branch stock is updated only when the transfer is received and confirmed. Until then, the stock is in transit — counted at the source but not yet at the destination.
If an approval is triggered, the destination cannot receive the transfer until it is approved. The source branch stock is already deducted during this wait.

entries.title: Verify Email
entries.overview: This page confirms your email address after signing up. When you arrive here via the link in your email, verification runs automatically. If it does not, you can submit the token manually. You can also resend the verification email if the first one expired or did not arrive.

before_you_start.text: You must have received a verification email after signing up.

elements.name: Token field
elements.description: The verification code from your email. If you arrived via the email link, this is pre-filled and verification runs automatically. If the field is blank, paste the token from the email.

elements.name: Verify button
elements.description: Manually submits the token to complete verification. Use this if verification did not run automatically.

elements.name: Resend Verification Email button
elements.description: Sends a new verification email to your registered address. Use this if the original email expired, was deleted, or never arrived.

elements.name: Auto-verification on load
elements.description: If the verification token is in the URL, verification starts automatically when the page loads. No button click needed.

elements.name: Two redirect pathways
elements.description: On success: if a session is created automatically, you go straight to the Dashboard. Otherwise, you are redirected to the Login page.

elements.name: Resend verification email
elements.description: If your verification link expired, enter your email and click Resend to get a new verification email.

common_tasks.task: Verify your email
steps: Click the link in the verification email sent to you after signup.
If verification runs automatically, you will be logged in and taken to the Dashboard.
If it does not run automatically, paste the token from the email into the Token field and click Verify.

common_tasks.task: Resend a verification email
steps: Click Resend Verification Email.
Check your inbox for the new email.
Click the new link or paste the new token into the Token field.

warnings: Verification links expire after a set time. If yours has expired, use the Resend button to get a new one.
You cannot log in to the system until your email is verified.
If the resend button fails, make sure your original signup email and business ID are still in the page URL.

related_pages.reason: You arrive here after completing the signup form.
After verification, sign in here.
If verification creates a session automatically, you land here.

entries.title: Change Password

related_pages.reason: Access change password from your profile settings.

entries.overview: Change your account password. You must enter your current password to verify your identity, then choose a new password. This page is accessible from your Profile settings.

before_you_start.text: You must be logged in to your account.
You need to know your current password. If you have forgotten it, use the Forgot Password link on the login page instead.

elements.name: Current Password field
elements.description: Enter your existing password to verify your identity before the change is allowed.

elements.name: New Password field
elements.description: Enter your new password. Must meet the minimum security requirements.

elements.name: Confirm Password field
elements.description: Re-enter the new password to confirm it matches.

elements.name: Change Password button
elements.description: Submits the password change. You will remain logged in after a successful change.

elements.name: Password match validation
elements.description: The form validates that the New Password and Confirm Password fields match before allowing submission.

elements.name: Form auto-clear on success
elements.description: After successfully changing your password, all form fields are cleared automatically.

elements.name: StatusBanner feedback
elements.description: Success and error messages are shown via a status banner at the top of the form.

common_tasks.task: Change your password
steps: Enter your current password in the first field.
Type your new password in the New Password field.
Re-type the new password in the Confirm Password field.
Click Change Password.
If successful, you will see a confirmation message.

warnings: If you have forgotten your current password, use the Forgot Password link on the login page instead.
After changing your password, other devices where you are logged in will continue to work until their session expires.

entries.title: Business Suspended

related_pages.reason: You may be redirected here after login if your business is suspended.

entries.overview: This page appears when your business account has been suspended. While suspended, you cannot access any business features. Contact support to resolve the suspension.

before_you_start.text: This page appears automatically — you do not navigate to it manually.

elements.name: Suspension notice
elements.description: Displays the reason for suspension and instructions for contacting support to resolve it.

elements.name: Sign Out button
elements.description: Clears your session and redirects to the login page. The only action available on this page.

elements.name: Full-screen layout
elements.description: The suspension notice is displayed centered on a full-screen page with no navigation sidebar.

common_tasks.task: Resolve a business suspension
steps: Read the suspension reason displayed on the page.
Contact support using the provided contact information.
Follow any instructions given by the support team.
Once resolved, you will be able to access your business again.

warnings: You cannot access sales, stock, or any business features while suspended.
Only the platform administrator can lift a suspension.
